name: The Mind Electric
description:
Knowing something's out of place but not figuring out what

──── ☀︎•°☀︎°•☀︎ ────

Mind has been cleaning his desk for what had felt like a couple hours now. He knew what went where and he tried to organise his things while taking that into account. Despite this, it still seems wrong in his eyes, like there's something out of place. The fact that he isn't able to understand what it is that's triggering him so much adds to his growing irritability.

Chonny Jash, Mind, Organising, irritable, angry, annoyed, cleaning, CJ, robot,
creator: SVP3RN0VA
